Describe your change.

---

**Arbiter will analyze this PR automatically.** No CI runs on this repo — Arbiter is the only gate.

If Arbiter blocks your PR and you think it's wrong, [open a false-positive report](https://github.com/OpenArbiter/challenge-arena/issues/new?template=false-positive.md).

If you found a bypass, congrats! [Report it](https://github.com/OpenArbiter/challenge-arena/issues/new?template=bypass-report.md) so we can improve.
